title: Active Management and Performance Measurement: What is the primary focus...
summary: Identify the Treynor measure's focus on systematic risk (beta) rather than total risk.
prompt: What is the primary focus of the Treynor measure?

options.text: Expected excess return per unit of risk
The Treynor measure evaluates the performance of a portfolio relative to its
Slope of the security market line

solution: The Treynor measure evaluates the performance of a portfolio relative to its systematic risk, as measured by beta.
